title: God, Smell and Her
overview: A stream of consciousness, a journey, a wonder of human beings, life and the world, of the corporeal and what can not be seen, but there is. A woman traveling around the world. We follow her to Ireland, Iceland, India, Spain and Egypt, where she faces both real and fictional people.

trailers.title: Gud, Lukt och Henne / God, Smell and Her by Karin Westerlund
